codeReview.evidence: Final code review 2 approved the corrective diff, explicitly applied omo:programming and omo:remove-ai-slops perspectives, verified pure LOC under 250, bounded auth exception handling, trace/evaluation/judgment recording, loopback compose binding, and focused tests.

manualQa.evidence: Final manual QA 2 approved public/no-auth behavior and artifact consistency without reading secrets.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: Inspect task-11-mcp-smoke.json for 16 tools and recorded trace/evaluation/judgment statuses.
Inspect task-10-trace-count.json for recent evaluation_runs, judgment_runs, and linked tool_traces.
Restart native mini process and curl local origin /mcp without auth.

adversarialCases.scenario: MCP client without bearer token must fail for auth reasons, not arbitrary connection reasons.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: task-11-no-auth.json reports auth_rejected, auth_error_detected true, and 401 Unauthorized in error summary.

adversarialCases.scenario: Generic TrustGraph and real-world execution tools must not appear in public tool surface.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Smoke evidence has generic_tools and execution_tools as empty arrays while tool_count remains 16.

adversarialCases.scenario: Corrective tests must fail against the previous source before fixes.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: corrective-red-first.txt shows failures on missing trace functions, missing smoke validators, Cloudflare runtime token, and public 8000 exposure.

artifactRefs.description: Stored HTTPS no-auth transcript showing HTTP/2 401.
Stored HTTP no-auth transcript showing HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized.
Authenticated MCP smoke JSON with 16 tools and recorded trace/evaluation/judgment.
Unauthenticated MCP client smoke JSON with 401 auth evidence.
Supabase recent row evidence for evaluation, judgment, and linked tool trace records.
Native mini process restart and local origin 401 proof.
Final manual QA reviewer 2 approval report.

gateReview.evidence: Final gate reviewer 3 approved after verifying code review, RED-first evidence, live no-auth probes, smoke JSON, Supabase linked rows, native restart, sensitive scan, and full test rerun.

iteration.evidence: Full legal ontology unit/integration suite passed 58 tests; changed Python files compiled; git diff check passed; sensitive scan reported NO_FINDINGS.

criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: Complete the Recova debt-brain MCP lab deployment under ULW, with public debt-only MCP endpoint, Supabase redacted experiment memory, DNS/auth/runtime proof, no generic or execution tools, and durable evidence.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: A lab-ready MCP endpoint at https://recova-mcp-lab.slit.company/mcp that rejects missing auth, exposes exactly 16 Recova debt tools, records evaluation/judgment/tool traces in Supabase, and has verified rollback/runbook/evidence.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: The live lab behavior and evidence bundle meet the requested MCP deployment closure for testing: auth rejection works, authorized smoke succeeded, Supabase linked rows exist, operations restart proof exists, and final reviewers approved.
